name: Healthcare
description: Models for hospitals, clinics, emergency departments, surgical services, and patient flow through healthcare systems.

name: Surgical Services
description: Sub-domain of Healthcare covering OR scheduling, perioperative care, surgical team workflows, and operating theatre management. Proposed by Seeder during the perioperative walkthrough — see proposal.csv row 1.

name: Service Operations
description: Cross-cutting domain for service-oriented queueing and resource-contention models that serve customers through finite-capacity resources, independent of a specific industry. Non-canonical cross-cutting theme already approved in prior walkthroughs.
